title: Render freeze fix for forge 1.20.1
description: This mod has been made purely out of my rage at minecraft freezing repeatedly on intel devices and needing a relaunch to unfreeze it, now instead of freezing the game, it only lags for half a second which i personally see as a big improvement.
body: This mod fixes a render thread bug in minecraft pre 1.21.8 that on intel devices would freeze the game window without actually freezing the game (like you see one frame but you can hear the world around you working normally). With it instaled, instead of freezing the game for eternity it just lags for half a second. I hope that this will prevent people from losing hardcore worlds as well as progress in normal worlds unfairly.
